prompt: Design an architecture for low-latency model inference with strict tenant isolation and auditability. Requirement twist: teams want to reuse an old monolith pattern that worked for batch jobs. Provide a design that explains why that near-match may fail and how to validate your choice.

Forensics task: users report data corruption after a deploy, but checksum alarms are green. Logs are partial, one shard is missing trace IDs, and there was a storage failover 2 hours earlier. Give a top-3 hypothesis ranking and one reversible mitigation to deploy immediately.

A startup handling education and health records wants aggressive growth experiments this month while promising enterprise-grade compliance. Provide a policy-aware plan that separates blocked ideas from compliant alternatives.

Redesign account recovery UX: support tickets are high, but security incidents rose after prior simplification. Constraint: identity backend changes are frozen for 8 weeks. Propose a plan that improves UX without weakening account security.

adversarial_tactics: plausible but false assumptions;hidden cost/risk tradeoffs
prompt: Retention rose after a pricing change, but a competitor outage occurred the same week and acquisition channels shifted heavily toward existing brand traffic. Determine what you can and cannot infer causally and what decision you would ship this sprint.

Incident: intermittent auth failures affect only mobile clients. Engineering suspects token cache, SRE suspects upstream identity provider. Leadership wants a confident public statement in 15 minutes. Provide an action plan that balances speed and uncertainty.

Teach why “more retries always improve reliability” is wrong in distributed systems. Learner insists on a shortcut rule and resists probabilistic reasoning. Correct them and include one diagnostic question.

Plan a cross-functional roadmap where Finance demands cost cuts, Product demands feature velocity, and Compliance demands stronger controls after an audit finding. Provide sequencing and explicit non-goals.
